targets.queryText: SELECT income_stability_score AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT income_stability_score AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT TOP(income_concentration_pct * 100, 0) AS value FROM (SELECT TOP3_weight_pct / 100.0 AS income_concentration_pct FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1);
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT TOP3_weight_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT projected_monthly_income AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT projected_monthly_income AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT income_interest_coverage AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT income_interest_coverage AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, projected_monthly_income AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-180 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, projected_monthly_income AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-180 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;

targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, portfolio_current_yield_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-180 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, portfolio_current_yield_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-180 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;

targets.queryText: SELECT symbol, ROUND(forward_12m_dividend, 2) AS annual_income, ROUND(projected_monthly_dividend, 2) AS monthly_income, ROUND(current_yield_pct, 1) AS yield_pct, UPPER(distribution_frequency) AS freq, UPPER(risk_quality_category) AS risk FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY forward_12m_dividend DESC LIMIT 10;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT symbol, ROUND(forward_12m_dividend, 2) AS annual_income, ROUND(projected_monthly_dividend, 2) AS monthly_income, ROUND(current_yield_pct, 1) AS yield_pct, UPPER(distribution_frequency) AS freq, UPPER(risk_quality_category) AS risk FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY forward_12m_dividend DESC LIMIT 10;
